creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad This Indian restaurant in the heart of Soho has been an institution for over 40 years and the regulars have been coming back over and over again for decades 🤯 This is @delhibrasserie, an authentic Indian restaurant serving delicious North Indian food and drinks within the best atmosphere. The staff are wonderful and they also have group seating options! Save this to your London list and share with someone who would love to go!

📍44 Frith St, London W1D 4SB

transcription.text: Okay so here's something that's increasingly rare to find in London. In the heart of buzzing Soho, there is an institution of a restaurant where the regulars have been coming back to time and time again for decades because it really is that good. This is the Delhi Brasserie that's been open for more than 40 years and it remains one of the best Indian restaurants in London. Not only is the food delicious and authentic, the ambience and atmosphere is top tier. The staff are incredibly warm and welcoming. It's also super family friendly and they have such a diverse menu. They also have options for group seating so if you're planning a special event, this is also a good one and don't skip their traditional Indian desserts which are delicious. So definitely add this one to your London list and share this with someone who would love to go.
